untranslatable_reason: Beta estimation and decile ranking are fundamental factor construction steps that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-action and technical indicators (close, sma, rsi, atr, macd, etc.). Beta requires multi-period returns correlation to a market benchmark, which is not available in the indicator set. The signal requires a custom beta calculation module and portfolio construction layer outside the scope of technical indicator conditions.
translation_notes: This is a factor-based statistical arbitrage signal requiring: (1) beta estimation from historical returns vs benchmark, (2) dynamic ranking/decile assignment, (3) portfolio-level long/short construction. Standard backtest engines with only price-action indicators cannot execute this rule. A custom factor module with beta calculation and decile binning capability is required.
